themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "In what ways does the Holy Spirit enable Christians to "hear" and obey what Scripture commands?".
